EmailTemplate.description: Email to use to contact current customers on cover who have ‘Recruitment Consultant’ as an occupation from the KCI scheme.
EmailTemplate.name: AR Removal – Job Role – More Info
EmailTemplate.subject: Your Insurance Renewal
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
You will have received an email from Kingsbridge confirming that we have removed your account from automatic renewal. Please be advised that the email you received is generated by our system when more information will be required about your job role at renewal.
Your policy coverage is unaffected at this time and no further action is required from you at this stage. However, we will contact you closer to renewal to confirm your details.
If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
